prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A single TypeScript source code card at the top center using modern syntax (async/await, optional chaining, nullish coalescing). Two arrows descend from it labeled "tsc". Left output card "target: ES2022": the compiled code looks nearly identical to the source, clean and concise, with a happy face and a small size indicator. Right output card "target: ES5": the compiled code is significantly longer and more verbose, with helper functions, Promise chains instead of async/await, and manual checks instead of optional chaining. It has a slightly overwhelmed face and a large size indicator. The contrast in length and complexity is stark.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
